'''Daniel Murray''' (born 21 March 1996) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} forward for the [[Widnes Vikings]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].

Murray played for the [[Salford Red Devils]] in the [[Super League]], and has spent time on loan from [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]] at the [[Rochdale Hornets]] and [[Oldham R.L.F.C.|Oldham]] in [[RFL League 1|Kingstone Press League 1]], the [[Bradford Bulls]] and [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]] and [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] in the [[Super League]]. He has also played for [[Hull Kingston Rovers|Hull KR]] on a permanent basis.

==Background==
Murray was born in [[Wigan]], [[Greater Manchester, England]].

==Playing career==
===Bradford===
He joined Bradford on a loan deal in February 2017.

===Salford===
In 2017, he made his début for [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]] against [[Widnes Vikings|Widnes]] in the Super League. He went onto make seven appearances for the Salford side.<ref name="Super League: Salford Red Devils 30-10 Widnes Vikings">{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/39708503|title=Super League: Salford Red Devils 30-10 Widnes Vikings|publisher=BBC|date=30 April 2017|accessdate=30 April 2017}}</ref>

===Hull KR===
Murray made 14 appearances for Hull KR.

===Halifax Panthers===
On 12 November 2020, it was announced that Murray would join Halifax permanently on a two-year deal from the 2021 season, having spent two previous spells with the West Yorkshire giants on loan and dual registration. He was part of the Panthers side that was 80 minutes from a Grand Final in 2021, narrowly losing out in the semi-finals.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/halifax-land-prop-dan-murray-from-hull-kr/|title=Halifax land prop Dan Murray from Hull KR|website=www.loverugbyleague.com|date=12 Nov 2020|accessdate=24 Dec 2020}}</ref>

===Widnes Vikings===
On 23 Feb 2024 it was reported that he had signed for [[Widnes Vikings]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on a 2-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|website=Widnes Vikings|date=23 Feb 2024|title=DAN MURRAY SIGNS FOR THE VIKINGS|url=https://widnesvikings.co.uk/dan-murray-signs-for-the-vikings/}}</ref>
